# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    M = int(data[1])
    A = list(map(int, data[2:]))
    A.sort()
    max_count = 0
    right = 0
    for left in range(N):
        while right < N and A[right] - A[left] < M:
            right += 1
        max_count = max(max_count, right - left)
    print(max_count)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
